reasoning: The HIPAA control 164.312(e)(2)(i) focuses on integrity controls, which in a Kubernetes context can be mapped to ensuring the integrity of data and operations through audit logging, encryption, and network policies. Audit logging ensures that all actions are recorded, which helps in maintaining data integrity by tracking changes. Encryption of etcd and secrets ensures data at rest is protected from unauthorized access or tampering. Network policies can enforce ingress restrictions to prevent unauthorized access to services, thereby maintaining the integrity of the network traffic.
title: 164_312_e_2_i: 164.312(e)(2)(i) Integrity controls
